replies.msg:
The United States stands with the United Kingdom against the Chinese Communist Party’s coercive bullying tactics.

We stand ready to help our British friends build critical infrastructure.

美國將與英國一道反對中國共產黨的脅迫性欺凌策略。我們準備好幫助我們的盟友 英國 去建立關鍵的基礎設施。

https://www.state.gov/on-chinas-attempted-coercion-of-the-united-kingdom/

https://twitter.com/secpompeo/status/1270459093086593025
快啦仲講！

The United States stands ready to assist our friends in the U.K. with any needs they have, from building secure and reliable nuclear power plants to developing trusted 5G solutions that protect their citizens’ privacy.

Free nations deal in true friendship and desire mutual prosperity, not political and corporate kowtows.

美國隨時準備為我們的盟友英國提供任何需要的幫助，從建造安全可靠的核電站到開發可信賴的5G解決方案以保護其公民的隱私。

自由國家交易的是真正的友誼，要求共享繁榮，而不是向政治和企業叩頭

The CCP’s browbeating of HSBC, in particular, should serve as a cautionary tale. Just last week, the bank’s Asia-Pacific CEO, Peter Wong, a member of the Chinese People’s Political Consultative Conference, signed a petition supporting Beijing’s disastrous decision to destroy Hong Kong’s autonomy and to break commitments made in an U.N.-registered treaty. That show of fealty seems to have earned HSBC little respect in Beijing, which continues to use the bank’s business in China as political leverage against London.

The CCP’s browbeating of HSBC, in particular, should serve as a cautionary tale. Just last week, the bank’s Asia-Pacific CEO, Peter Wong, a member of the Chinese People’s Political Consultative Conference, signed a petition supporting Beijing’s disastrous decision to destroy Hong Kong’s autonomy and to break commitments made in an U.N.-registered treaty. That show of fealty seems to have earned HSBC little respect in Beijing, which continues to use the bank’s business in China as political leverage against London.
